seo.title: Open Frontier | Practical AI for Real Work
seo.description: A high-clarity AI platform for teams that need robust reasoning, safe deployment patterns, and production-grade reliability.

hero.title: Build with reliable AI systems that scale from prototype to production.
hero.subtitle: Open Frontier combines model capability, safety controls, and deployment ergonomics into one coherent product experience.

sections.heading: A complete platform, not just an API endpoint
sections.intro: Designed for product teams that care about quality, control, and predictable behavior under real-world load.

items.title: Long-context reasoning
items.description: Handle complex, multi-document workflows with consistency across long conversations and large input sets.

items.title: Configurable guardrails
items.description: Apply policy layers and risk controls by use case, with clear boundaries for high-stakes tasks.

items.title: Production observability
items.description: Inspect model usage, latency profiles, and behavioral drift to keep quality stable over time.

items.title: Tool-using agents
items.description: Compose model calls with tools and structured outputs to automate end-to-end workflows.

items.title: Low-latency serving
items.description: Optimize response speed with routing and caching strategies tuned for interactive applications.

items.title: Enterprise controls
items.description: Support role-based access, key rotation, and deployment controls for compliance-sensitive teams.

panels.title: Ship faster with reusable blocks
panels.body: Standardized prompts, test suites, and evaluation loops reduce time spent debugging model behavior in late stages.

panels.title: Keep quality stable after launch
panels.body: Capture runtime signals and feed them back into model policy and prompt revisions before they become user-facing incidents.

sections.heading: Trusted by teams in research, finance, health, and software

sections.quote: Clear safety boundaries and strong model quality let us move fast without compromising standards.
sections.author: Jordan Lee

sections.heading: Deploy your first production workflow this week
sections.text: Run locally, iterate quickly, and expose securely through Cloudflare Tunnel while you finalize production infrastructure.
